title: Ability to view User-Specific Activity (via audit log or otherwise) - Across Entire Platform
excerpt: As an admin, I should be able to navigate to a administrative view where I can filter by one or more users, and have a view of that user’s Activity across the entire Monday platform. Similar to the Audit Log feature/func…

posts.author: craig.manning (Craig Manning)
posts.cookedHtml:
As an admin, I should be able to navigate to a administrative view where I can filter by one or more users, and have a view of that user’s Activity across the entire Monday platform. Similar to the Audit Log feature/functionality, but inclusive of their activity across the entire Monday platform.

Currently, this is limited to navigating to a specific board, but as we know users interact with many, many boards across the entire platform and as a security administrator we need to be able to show controls are in place to track or identify where users affect company data.

posts.author: ChristinaH (Christina)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree! This would be SO helpful - it’s hard to track all of the things I’ve done in a day (usually doing this by pen an paper) across the entire monday.com account. Would be wonderful to get this view somehow. Even the simple free Basecamp software had this!

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! We’ve developed Master Activity Logs, which acts as a ‘Master Activity Log’ for user activities in multiple boards. It offers advanced reporting based on that data as well. Hopefully that helps!

posts.author: craig.manning (Craig Manning)
posts.cookedHtml: Appreciate the heads up! I think this should be an OOTB solution by Monday but you guys have creatively solved the issue. Are you looking at doing anything for Enterprise customers? For example we have 500+ boards as an organization (across all users/all depts).

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you Craig! We are open to accommodating enterprise customers with a solution tailored towards a larger team size. I’ve sent you a PM. If there is any other interest in an enterprise-tailored version of our solution, please contact me at liam@lovelysolutions.co!
